name: Doggie Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
Liver powder available in health food stores.
1. Mix flours and all other dry ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Add egg, oil, and beef broth to the flour mixture. Mix until a dough forms; add more flour if necessary to create a dough that can be rolled out.
3. Roll the dough on a floured surface to a thickness of 1/2 inch (½").
4. Cut into desired shapes using a cookie cutter.
5. Prick each biscuit halfway through with a fork.
6. Place biscuits on foil-covered cookie sheets and bake for 2 hours at 300°F (150°C).
7. Turn off the heat but leave the biscuits in the oven until they are hardened.
8. Store up to 3 months in a plastic bag in the refrigerator.
